prose:
**TEMPO Frontier-Orbital Gap** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell neutral doublet). Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` (N = 29 atoms, single-point calculation at fixed geometry). SCF converged in 12 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724 eV** (HOMO = −6.3375 eV, LUMO = −2.4651 eV). Total electronic energy = −483.88366 Hartree. Koopmans-derived ionization potential (vertical) = 6.3375 eV, electron affinity = 2.4651 eV, electronegativity = 4.4013 eV, chemical hardness = 1.9362 eV, electrophilicity index = 5.0025 eV. No warnings; integrity trustworthy.</prose>
